title: Prologue
content: A short prologue that hints at what is to come.

title: Departure
content:
The protagonist leaves home for the first time, uncertain but determined.

A second paragraph in the departure chapter; longer documents have multi-paragraph chapters.

title: The Encounter
content: An unexpected meeting changes the course of the journey entirely.

title: Return
content: The road home is longer than the road out.

title: Epilogue
content: Years later, the events of that summer are remembered differently by each who lived them.
